item.name: Wind-up Dalamud
item.description:
Do not attempt to pry open under any circumstances.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Dalamud minion.
item.tooltip:
The lifeblood spilled in
Dalamud's name shall be
blessed upon his return.
  - Foxe
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases action party movement speed by 30%.
Duration: 10s
